decks.notes: This deck aims to control the game by using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy while also providing an engine for card advantage and board presence. The deck can generate mana quickly with Gaea's Cradle and various mana dorks, allowing for explosive plays and a proactive game plan. The inclusion of Goblin Bombardment provides additional reach and a win condition, while the toolbox of creatures allows for adaptability to various matchups. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through efficient creature selection and resource management.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through counterspells, hand disruption, and removal spells. It also aims to control the board with creatures like Krovikan Horror and Zombie Infestation. Card advantage is generated through cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Deep Analysis, while also utilizing cards like Intuition to set up powerful plays. The deck is designed to outlast the opponent and eventually overwhelm them with its control elements. The manabase is carefully crafted to ensure the deck runs smoothly and consistently.

The main concept of this Goblins deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey, Goblin Piledriver, and Goblin Warchief, you can quickly build a board presence and deal significant damage early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator provides additional reach and removal options. The mana base also includes disruptive lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland to slow down the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to pressure the opponent and win the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using counterspells and removal while building up the power of Psychatog by filling the graveyard with cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Gush. The deck includes disruption cards like Armageddon to disrupt the opponent's mana base and City of Brass to ensure all colors of mana are available. The deck also includes card draw and selection like Opt and Impulse to find key pieces when needed. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent and overwhelm them with the power of Psychatog.

The deck focuses on a graveyard-based combo strategy using cards like Hermit Druid, Karmic Guide, and Animate Dead to quickly assemble powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath or Triskelion. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to control the opponent's hand and board state. The mana base consists of a variety of lands to ensure consistent mana production. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive spells.

The main goal of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's hand and board with discard spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, while also applying pressure with efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Ravenous Rats. The deck aims to slowly chip away at the opponent's life total with The Rack and Wasteland to prevent the opponent from developing their board. By utilizing cards like Cursed Scroll and Funeral Charm, the deck can adapt to different board states and maintain control throughout the game.

This Mono Red Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents' mana base and board presence through land destruction spells like Stone Rain and Pillage, while also utilizing efficient burn spells such as Lightning Bolt to control the pace of the game. Additionally, the deck includes aggressive creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic to apply pressure early on. The inclusion of cards like Burning Wish allows for versatility in accessing a sideboard for specific situations, while cards like Mishra's Factory and Rishadan Port provide additional ways to control the opponent's creatures and resources.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo involving Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle, which allows you to cheat a 12/12 creature onto the battlefield for only one mana. This combo is supported by a disruptive suite of countermagic, card draw, and hand disruption spells to protect it and control the game until you can safely execute your combo. By using efficient card selection and versatile disruption tools, this deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent with a massive threat that they struggle to deal with.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo card Replenish to rapidly fill the board with powerful cards. By playing cards like Intuition and Burning Wish, the player can effectively tutor for the pieces they need to set up their combo. Other cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal help to accelerate mana production. The deck also includes control elements like Earthquake and Seal of Cleansing to help stall the opponent while setting up the combo. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful board presence.

The deck focuses on using enchantresses to draw cards whenever an enchantment is played, while also ramping up mana with cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. It then aims to lock down the opponent with cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing, eventually winning the game by making all enchantments into powerful creatures with Opalescence or by setting up a lock with Solitary Confinement. The deck is built around the synergy between enchantress effects and powerful enchantments to overwhelm the opponent and control the game.

The deck focuses on using Hermit Druid to fill the graveyard with creatures, then using cards like Animate Dead and Karmic Guide to reanimate powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath. It also has the potential to combo off with Phyrexian Devourer and Triskelion for a lethal amount of damage. The deck utilizes cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's gameplan, while also using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key combo pieces. The deck's mana base is built to support these combos and ensure the deck can consistently execute its gameplan.

The main focus of this Aggro Goblins deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing a combination of low-cost and high-powered creatures like Goblin Lackey, Goblin Matron, Goblin Piledriver, and Goblin Ringleader. The deck also includes support cards like Gempalm Incinerator, Goblin Warchief, and Mogg Fanatic to further enhance the aggressive nature of the deck. By quickly building a board presence and applying pressure early in the game, this deck aims to outpace and outdamage the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

This goblin deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of low-cost, aggressive creatures. By utilizing the synergy between cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly amass a board presence, combined with powerful buffs from cards like Goblin Warchief and Goblin King, the deck seeks to deal damage swiftly and efficiently to secure victory. With removal options like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander to control the board, along with disruption from cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port, this deck aims to maintain pressure and close out the game in a few decisive turns.

This aggressive Goblin deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost Goblin creatures and overwhelming the opponent with damage. The deck includes efficient creatures like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Piledriver, along with ways to boost their power like Goblin Warchief and Goblin King. The deck also includes removal options like Gempalm Incinerator and Naturalize to deal with opposing threats. With a mix of creature aggression and disruption, this deck aims to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure to its opponent in order to achieve victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through the use of cards like Sphere of Resistance and Swords to Plowshares, while utilizing Oath of Druids as a win condition to fetch out powerful creatures like Terravore. The deck also includes disruption and land destruction in the form of cards like Cataclysm and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The goal is to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent by efficiently managing resources and controlling the board state.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo potential of Replenish along with powerful enchantments such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave. By strategically using cards like Attunement and Intuition to fill up the graveyard with enchantments, the player can quickly bring back multiple enchantments with Replenish to overwhelm their opponent. Additionally, the deck includes control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing to deal with threats while setting up the combo. The deck aims to establish a dominating board presence through recurring enchantments and controlling the game state.

The main focus of this BW Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate, hand disruption with Duress, and board wipes such as Wrath of God. The deck also aims to generate card advantage with Skeletal Scrying and Gerrard's Verdict, while maintaining resilience with Eternal Dragon and Exalted Angel. Tsabo's Web helps to control the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck seeks to control the game and grind out victories by outlasting the opponent's threats.

The main focus of this Aggro-Elves deck is to flood the board with creatures that generate mana and provide buffs to each other, creating a fast and overwhelming offensive strategy. By utilizing cards like Priest of Titania and Wirewood Symbiote to generate extra mana and untap creatures, the deck aims to quickly build a wide board presence and then finish off opponents with cards like Timberwatch Elf and Overrun. The inclusion of Concordant Crossroads ensures that the deck can attack and end the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the Enchantress engine to draw cards and generate value while setting up a powerful combo finish. By chaining together enchantments that draw cards like Enchantress's Presence and Sterling Grove, the player can dig through their deck quickly and find key combo pieces like Opalescence and Parallax Wave. This combo allows the player to control the board by repeatedly exiling and returning all creatures, clearing the way for a decisive victory. The deck also includes disruption elements like Swords to Plowshares and Aura of Silence to control the opponent's threats while building up its own win condition.

The main idea behind this deck is to use enchantress cards to draw a lot of cards and generate significant advantage over the opponent. By using cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, the player can draw tons of cards while also ramping with cards like Wild Growth and Exploration. The deck also includes key combo pieces like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and eventually win the game. The inclusion of cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing provide additional utility to deal with threats from the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to draw cards and ramp up mana, ultimately leading to a game-winning combo. By playing enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, the player can draw cards whenever they cast enchantments. Cards like Replenish allow the player to bring back enchantments from the graveyard, while cards like Opalescence can turn enchantments into creatures for an alternate win condition. The deck also includes mana ramp with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, as well as disruption and protection with cards like Seal of Cleansing and Solitary Confinement.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of control elements and creatures that grow stronger over time. By playing powerful spells like Meddling Mage and Quirion Dryad, along with disruption spells like Counterspell and Force Spike, the deck aims to control the game while also growing its own threats. Cards like Gush and Opt help the deck maintain card advantage, while Swords to Plowshares and Armageddon provide additional removal and disruption. The deck aims to outvalue opponents and control the game until it can secure a win.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells and removal spells, while also utilizing land-based strategies to gain incremental advantages over time. The deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies using cards like Counterspell and Swords to Plowshares, while also generating card advantage with cards like Fact or Fiction and Standstill. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue and outlast opponents by effectively managing resources and making calculated decisions throughout the game.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures and efficient burn spells. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with powerful spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, it can deal damage consistently in the early turns. The inclusion of cards like Grim Lavamancer and Cursed Scroll provides additional reach and removal options. The deck also includes some card advantage engines like Sylvan Library to maintain momentum. With a blend of direct damage and creature presence, this deck aims to close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, while also dealing damage with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate. Cursed Scroll and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional direct damage, while Price of Progress punishes opponents for playing non-basic lands. The deck aims to win quickly and efficiently by dealing damage consistently and efficiently, making it a formidable force in the aggro archetype in Premodern 1 vs 1 matchups.

The main focus of this deck is to establish a lock using Stasis and Forsaken City to prevent opponents from untapping their lands. By continuously bouncing Stasis with cards like Boomerang and Chain of Vapor, the deck aims to control the board and keep the opponent locked down while dealing damage with cards like Black Vise. The deck also includes a small combo package with Brain Freeze and Gush for additional win conditions. Overall, the strategy revolves around resource denial and disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on efficiently using combo pieces to assemble a powerful creature while disrupting opponents with counterspells and card draw. The goal is to quickly drop a Phyrexian Dreadnought and counter any threats to it with Stifle, while also controlling the game with counterspells like Counterspell and card draw spells like Gush and Accumulated Knowledge. The deck aims to win through the combo of Dreadnought and Stifle while denying the opponent any opportunities to counteract it.

This deck aims to quickly put a massive threat on the board in the form of Phyrexian Dreadnought, then protect it with various countermagic spells like Counterspell and Foil. The deck includes ways to dig for combo pieces with cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Impulse. Stifle is used to disrupt opponents' strategies and protect the combo. The deck focuses on efficiently assembling the Dreadnought combo while maintaining control over the game through countermagic and card draw.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo with Stifle to prevent the sacrifice effect, allowing for a powerful 12/12 creature to hit the board. Counterspells and card draw help protect and find pieces of the combo, while disruption spells like Chain of Vapor and Thwart can be used to control the opponent's board state. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a massive threat while controlling the game with counters and disruptive spells to secure victory.

The core strategy of this deck revolves around quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Terravore, while disrupting opponent's mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. The deck also utilizes powerful creatures like Exalted Angel and Weathered Wayfarer to maintain board presence and pressure the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure, disrupt opponent's resources, and gradually overpower them with its threats.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Mox Diamond and Weathered Wayfarer to cast powerful land creatures like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose. It also includes disruptive spells like Meddling Mage and Swords to Plowshares to control the board. The key strategy revolves around using Armageddon and Terravore to destroy opposing lands, crippling their resources while maintaining your own advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient removal, ultimately leading to a fast victory through a combination of creature beatdown and land destruction.

The main strategy of this deck involves utilizing cards like Phyrexian Devourer and Altar of Dementia to quickly fill up the graveyard, then using Tinker to search for powerful artifacts like Fling to deal massive damage to the opponent. This combo is supported by cards like Defense Grid and Tsabo's Web to protect and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes mana acceleration cards like Mind Stone and Ancient Tomb to quickly cast the combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to assemble the combo and win the game in a fast and efficient manner.
